caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on a breaking news event involving a political figure named Tejashwi and Chief Minister Nitish Kumar. The scene shows a man being interviewed by multiple journalists holding microphones with various media outlet logos, including ANI. The man seems to be addressing the media amidst a crowd of people, possibly at a press conference or public event. The text on the screen indicates that this is a significant development, with the headline suggesting a "direct hit" on Nitish Kumar by Tejashwi. The atmosphere appears tense and charged, typical of high-stakes political news coverage. The time displayed on the screen is 10:05 PM, indicating that this is a late-night news broadcast.
